title: Amtech W5600 Mechanics Screwdriver Set Magnetic Tips, Steel Blade Flat Head Slotted and Phillips, Hex Bolsters use with Wrench or Socket
features: Uses: The Amtech Mechanics Screwdriver Set is made to adapt to your needs having suitability for a variety of situations - workshop assembling furniture maintenance repair electrical work and home
High Quality: Every screwdriver has been heat-treated with hardened high impact heavy-duty chrome vanadium steel blades - with magnetic tips to ensure you never lose a screw
Hex Bolsters: Need more torque? The Hex bolsters has a standard size that can be used with wrench or socket to give you more power to your twist
Includes: With 6 Flatheads & 6 Phillips apiece you can be sure that you have a screwdriver for every task
Carry Case: Packed in a blow-moulded case your screwdriver set will be neatly stored in a secure unit that’s small robust light and easy to carry
description: From the manufacturer Why Amtech? Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Amtech W5600 12pc Mechanics Screwdriver Set The Amtech Mechanic Screwdriver Set is the ideal kit for your regular electrical & automotive tasks. Can be used for a wide range of uses, including DIY, furniture, wooden work, repair, electrical, maintenance, and home. In a set, you will find 6 Flathead screwdrivers and 6 Phillips screwdrivers supplied in a carry case. Hex Bolsters for extra torque Chrome vanadium steel construction Slotted & Phillips screwdrivers Includes carry case
